key.name: lockscreen-mode
key.description: Visual style of the lock screen. WACK is the classic GNOME-compliant mode; Cupertino emulates macOS Sonoma style.

key.name: cupertino-always-show-user
key.summary: Always show user widget in Cupertino mode
key.description: If true, the user widget is always shown in Cupertino mode. Notifications are hidden by default but can be toggled by pressing Shift+N.

key.name: clock-animation
key.description: Animation applied to the date and time while opening the authentication prompt.

key.name: prompt-animation
key.description: Animation applied to the authentication prompt while it appears.
